params.name: Herma of Pericles
params.description:
On Dec 29, 430 BC, the Statue of Pericles was completed by Cressile.
This statue was carved to commemorate the exploits of Pericles, a politician and general during the ancient Greek. The helmet on his head signifies his position as strategus, and his curly hair and beard exposed under the helmet give him a solemn appearance. His head is slightly tilted to the left, and his deep and peaceful eyes make him look calm and confident.
